role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic markers (no script visible) and abstained from making unsupported claims.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and settlement patterns consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Musa, Mangifera) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (utility poles, road surfaces) and building codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (fence posts, wiring styles) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Cambodia. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing grounded evidence (e.g., specific utility pole styles, plant species) that the meta-agent and tournament judge successfully used to disambiguate between the highly similar candidates (Cambodia, Thailand, Laos).

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of reddish soil and banana plants match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified banana and mango trees visible in the home garden.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the wooden utility poles and dirt road.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the specific concrete fence posts and house construction style.
